sizing_rule.note: Optimal f calculated from fitted distribution (SCALE, KURT, LOC, SKEW) of historical trade P&L bounded at ±3 sigmas. Requires minimum 232 trades. Position size derived from cumulative probability distribution of fitted parameters.

source_rule_text: Fit historical trade distribution parameters (KURT, SCALE, LOC, SKEW) to actual trade data, then calculate optimal f from the fitted distribution bounded by ±3 sigmas to determine position sizing.
